Do you really think that Huawei cannot hack into core part of the UK network, as you allow Huawei to build the non-core parts of the network?
Although you need to pay more money to change the supplier of 5G network, if you insist allowing Huawei to be the supplier, you will eventually spend MUCH MORE for network security.
UK residents will be monitored by CCP, those illegal thugs that are disguising as Chinese Government. They can suddenly kidnap UK residents, transport them to China and even kill them.

YOU ARE WARNED. UK WILL FALL IF YOU INSIST.

UK or F.U.C.K.? Or I should ask: United Kingdom, or "Fallen United Crappy Kingdom"?
Your choice.
